nasb.text: The chief priests and the scribes were seeking how they might put Him to death; for they were afraid of the people.

esv.text: And the chief priests and the scribes were seeking how to put him to death, for they feared the people.

cnv.text: 祭司長和經學家設法怎樣殺害耶穌，因為他們懼怕群眾。

ccb.text: 祭司长和律法教师因为害怕百姓，便密谋如何杀害耶稣。

csbs.text: 祭司长们和经文士们在图谋怎样能杀掉耶稣，因为他们怕民众。
